brand.name: Print By Falcon
brand.tagline: Your specialist store for printers and supplies

auth.otpSent: We sent a verification code via WhatsApp
auth.devOtpHint: Dev mode: the code is printed in the server log
auth.mustResetPassword: This is a temporary password. Please set a new one before continuing.
auth.registrationNameHelp: Leave blank if you already have an account — we'll use your saved profile.

admin.loginPrompt: Enter your credentials to access the admin panel
admin.unauthorized: You do not have permission to access this area

common.confirmDelete: Delete permanently? This cannot be undone.
common.confirmArchive: Hide from the storefront? You can unarchive later.
common.hasDependentsHelp: Can't delete — dependent records exist. Archive instead.

products.title: Products
products.specsHelp: Key/value pair — leave blank to remove
products.uploadHint: JPG / PNG / WebP — up to 5 MB

brands.title: Brands
brands.slugHelp: Auto-generated from English name if left blank

brand.has_dependents: Cannot delete — products or printer models reference this brand

category.has_dependents: Cannot delete — products or subcategories exist
category.cycle: A category cannot be its own ancestor

printer.has_dependents: Cannot delete — products reference this printer model
printer.duplicate_model: A model with this name already exists for the same brand

image.unreadable: File is not a readable image
image.EACCES: Storage directory not writable — contact dev team
image.unknown: Something went wrong processing the image

register.title: Apply for a business account
register.subtitle: Fill this short form and our team will reach out within 24 hours with your approval and negotiated pricing.
register.sla: We'll email you within 24 hours. You can keep browsing at standard prices in the meantime.

field.passwordHelp: 10+ characters, mix of upper/lower case and digits.

success.title: Thanks — we received your application.
success.body: Our team will review your details and email you within 24 hours. While you wait, feel free to browse the catalog and place orders at standard prices.

signup.email_in_use: This email is already linked to an existing account. Sign in instead, or use a different email.
signup.phone_in_use: This phone number is already on another account. Use a different number or contact support if you think this is a mistake.
signup.cr_in_use: This commercial registry number is already registered with us. Contact support if you think this is a mistake.
signup.tax_in_use: This tax card number is already registered with us. Contact support if you think this is a mistake.
signup.pending_exists: We already have a pending application with this email. We'll be in touch soon.

login.noAccountYet: Don't have a business account yet? Apply here

reason.required: Please give the applicant a clear reason (10+ characters)

rate_limit.exceeded: Too many requests — please try again later

sku.format: SKU may only contain letters, numbers, dots, dashes, and underscores

slug.format: Slug may only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes

common.error: Something went wrong, please try again
